article.title: Uber Interview Guidance
article.content:
Hi Everyone,

I'm targeting Uber for SDE-2 role and I've heard that Uber tends to emphasize ****Multithreading, Concurrency**** in their interviews.

Could someone please share:

Key topics to focus on specifically for Uber's system design interviews

Any good resources (blogs, GitHub repos, YouTube videos) for multithreading and concurrency

Any past experiences or interview debriefs that can help me align my prep with what Uber typically asks

Any help or pointers would be greatly appreciated!

Thanks in advance 🙏

post.content: Hello, I have heard it will depend on the role you are interviewing for - full-stack, infratructure, etc... Can you share your interview experience?
